allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total estagnados: {d[\\"total\\"]}'\); [print\(f'  - {l[\\"nomeEmpresa\\"]} | estágio: {l[\\"estagioPipeline\\"]} | {l[\\"diasParado\\"]}d | estagnado: {l[\\"estagnado\\"]}'\) for l in d['leads'][:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d.get\('token',''\); print\('OK token=' + t[:30] + '...'\) if t else print\('ERRO:', d\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'  {l[\\"nomeEmpresa\\"]:30} | estagnado={l[\\"estagnado\\"]}'\) for l in d['leads']]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('totalEstagnados:', d['kpis']['totalEstagnados']\); print\('Alertas PIPELINE_ESTAGNADO:'\); [print\(f'  [{a[\\"tipo\\"]}] {a[\\"mensagem\\"]}'\) for a in d['alertas'] if a['tipo']=='PIPELINE_ESTAGNADO']")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('pendentes:',d['pendentes']\); print\('atrasadas:',d['atrasadas']\); print\('estagnados:',d.get\('estagnados','CAMPO AUSENTE'\)\); print\('propostasS/Resp:',d['propostasSemResposta']\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d['tendencia']; print\(f'{len\(t\)} semanas:'\); [print\(f'  {w[\\"label\\"]} | leads={w[\\"leads\\"]} | tarefas={w[\\"tarefasConcluidas\\"]} | contratos={w[\\"fechadosGanhos\\"]}'\) for w in t]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('token ok' if d.get\('token'\) else d\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d.get\('token',''\); print\('Login OK'\) if t else print\('ERRO:',d\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{l[\\"nomeEmpresa\\"]:30} | tel: {l[\\"telefone\\"]}'\) for l in d['leads']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys; lines=sys.stdin.read\(\).split\('\\n'\); print\(lines[-1] if lines else 'err'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d['conteudo']; print\('ID:', d['id']\); print\('Status:', d['status']\); print\('Post \(100 chars\):', c['post'][:100]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('token ok:', bool\(d.get\('token'\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d.get\('conteudo',{}\); p=c.get\('prompt',''\); print\('agente:', c.get\('agente',{}\).get\('nome'\)\); print\('promptImagem presente:', bool\(c.get\('promptImagem'\)\)\); print\('ETAPA 2 imagem no prompt:', 'ETAPA 2' in p and 'IMAGEM' in p\); print\('ETAPAs:', [x for x in ['ETAPA 1','ETAPA 2'] if x in p]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d.get\('token',''\); import base64; parts=t.split\('.'\); payload=parts[1]+'=='*4; import json as j; p=j.loads\(base64.b64decode\(payload[:len\(payload\)-\(len\(payload\)%4\)]+\('='*\(4-len\(payload\)%4\)\)[:1]\)\); print\('exp em horas:', round\(\(p['exp']-p['iat']\)/3600,1\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('conteudo present:', 'conteudo' in d\); print\('error?:', d.get\('message',''\)[:100] if 'message' in d else 'none'\)")
